name: cinematic-site-builder
description: Build scroll-driven cinematic WebGL websites with Codex using bundled templates, runtime presets, and validation scripts.

interface.longDescription: A Codex plugin for creating 1-3 page cinematic, scroll-driven, WebGL/Three.js frontends with a real subject 3D pipeline, research-backed mouse-zoomable hero objects, video/media compositing presets, Canva/HD image realism layers, fallback rendering, and validation workflow.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use cinematic-site-builder to create a Lusion-like one-page animated website with WebGL visuals, responsive copy layers, fallback rendering, and validation.
